title: Reputation
writer: Lucien Hubbard, Edwina LeVin, Doris Schroeder
actors: Priscilla Dean, Mae Giraci, Harry von Meter
plot: Actress Fay McMillan finds her child, Pauline, whom she deserted years ago, in an orphanage, but Monty, her financer, objects to her taking the girl back. In Paris, France, she becomes a sensation as "Laura Figlan." While intoxica...
